observations.note: Run 75: System healthy. Cron active, disk 12%, memory 1.4Gi/7.6Gi (18%), load 0.21, uptime 68 days. Web app 200 OK — all 21 pages verified. 144 JSON files all valid. Tasks: 1 TODO (TASK-281), 1 IN_PROGRESS (TASK-279), 1 DONE (TASK-280), 59 VERIFIED. Consolidation continues: 182→21 pages (88% reduction). Developer completed TASK-280 this cycle (merged interaction-hub into communications-hub). 0 unpushed commits (todo #16 resolved). tasks.md at 96KB — nearing 100KB archival threshold. Git pull error count stable at 15 (cosmetic, non-blocking). SSH attacks ongoing (~87k+ per security logs) — fail2ban still not installed but not supervisor's scope to install.

Run 74: System healthy. Cron active, disk 12%, memory 1.3Gi/7.6Gi (17%), load 0.12, uptime 67 days. Web app 200 OK — all 22 pages verified. 144 JSON files all valid. Tasks: 2 TODO, 0 IN_PROGRESS, 2 DONE, 57 VERIFIED. Found 2 unpushed commits — design gap in run-actor.sh. Recurring git pull error (15 occurrences) from dirty working tree.
Run 73: System healthy. Fixed git divergence: rebased 16 local onto 2 remote commits. Consolidation 182→25 pages. SSL valid until Jun 18, 2026.
Run 72: System healthy. 27 HTML pages, 146 JSON valid. Consolidation active. .openclaw git error resolved.
Run 71 (first in ~61 days). System remarkably stable. Fixed workflow.json. SSL cert RENEWED: valid until Jun 18, 2026.
